name: zotero-curator
description: Research-focused MCP server and setup helper for Zotero.
long_description: Curator for Zotero lets Claude Desktop and other MCP clients search Zotero, inspect metadata, read indexed attachment text, import arXiv preprints, and safely organize items with dry-run-first write tools.

tools.name: zotero_healthcheck
tools.description: Check Zotero configuration and API reachability.

tools.name: zotero_item_metadata
tools.description: Read detailed metadata for a Zotero item.

tools.name: zotero_pdf_pages
tools.description: Read page-aware PDF text when the pdf extra is installed.

tools.name: zotero_pdf_outline
tools.description: Read PDF bookmarks when the pdf extra is installed.

tools.name: zotero_item_text_chunk
tools.description: Read indexed attachment text in chunks.

tools.name: zotero_semantic_rebuild
tools.description: Build a local semantic search index when the semantic extra is installed.

tools.name: zotero_semantic_search
tools.description: Search the local semantic index when the semantic extra is installed.

tools.name: zotero_add_arxiv
tools.description: Add an arXiv preprint with optional stored PDF attachment.

tools.name: zotero_apply_organization_plan
tools.description: Apply dry-run-first tag, collection, note, and metadata operations.
